---
title: "lognormal_prior"
generated: true
description: "Log-normal prior on the lengthscale `rho` (median `exp(mu)`)."
---

[‹ back to `nitrix.stats.priors`](../nitrix-stats-priors.qmd)

<!-- nitrix:gen sig:lognormal_prior -->
```python
lognormal_prior(mu: float, sd: float) -> PriorFn
```
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen overview:lognormal_prior -->
Log-normal prior on the lengthscale `rho` (median `exp(mu)`).

`p(rho) ~ (1/rho) exp(-(log rho - mu)**2 / (2 sd**2))` on `rho > 0`, so
`-log p(rho) = (log rho - mu)**2 / (2 sd**2) + log rho` (up to a constant):
a symmetric-in-`log rho` pull toward the prior median `exp(mu)` with
multiplicative spread `sd`.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen params:lognormal_prior -->
**Parameters**

| parameter | type | shape | default | description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `mu` | `float` | — | — | Prior mean of `log rho` (so `exp(mu)` is the prior median lengthscale). |
| `sd` | `float` | — | — | Prior standard deviation of `log rho` (`> 0`). |

**Returns** `PriorFn`.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->
